news.headline: Envoy certified as vendor for DayBlink GPO, offering services to 1,100+ luxury hotels globally, enhancing guest experience.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, CA, on March 12, 2025, Envoy Technologies Inc. declared its certification as a vendor for DayBlink GPO, the primary hospitality buying consortium for luxury independents worldwide. This certification allows Envoy's electric car-sharing services to be accessible to over 1,100 independent luxury hotels globally. The partnership with DayBlink GPO offers DayBlink properties a high-end mobility solution to fulfill the increasing guest requirement for on-site electric vehicle access, ultimately enriching the luxury travel experience.

news.headline: Bioxytran creates treatment for bird flu in chickens, potentially saving billions; galectin antagonist in preclinical trials.
news.summary: A promising galectin antagonist, soluble in water, is currently under consideration for preclinical trials. This new development raises hope for swift containment of H5N1 outbreaks. The antagonist has the potential to significantly impact the containment of such outbreaks, with preliminary data showing promising results. The development and testing of this antagonist could prove crucial in controlling the spread of H5N1, which is a major global concern for public health. This advancement may offer a faster and more effective solution, potentially saving countless lives. It is anticipated that further details and results of the preclinical trials will be released shortly.

news.headline: Celebrity Cruises opens bookings for Galapagos Expeditions on Celebrity Flora in 2027, featuring conservation project.
news.summary: Celebrity Cruises is offering guests the opportunity to participate in their unique conservation initiative, Rewilding Galapagos, marking its 10th anniversary. Bookings are now open for the award-winning Galapagos expeditions on the impressive Celebrity Flora vessel. The program allows passengers on all sailings to engage in this initiative. This news was announced in Miami on March 12, 2025.

news.headline: Wall Street surges as February inflation cools more than expected, with S&P 500 up 1.1%, Nasdaq 100 up 1.6%, and Dow Jones up 0.8%.
news.summary: Stocks experienced a significant surge on Wednesday morning, following a two-day decline, as the market reacted to lower-than-expected inflation data. This reinforced expectations for potential Federal Reserve rate cuts in 2025. Futures for key U.S. indices saw a strong rebound, with the S&P 500 up by 1.1%, the Nasdaq 100 soaring 1.6%, and the Dow Jones Industrial Average rising 0.8% by 9:00 a.m. ET. Small caps, represented by the iShares Russell 2000 ETF, also showed gains of 1.2%. The latest Consumer Price Index report revealed that inflation had cooled more than forecasted in February, with headline CPI at 2.8% year-over-year, below the anticipated 2.9%. Core CPI, which excludes food and energy prices, also slowed. These indicators have garnered increased speculation regarding potential future rate cuts.

news.headline: Top 5 findings from February's US CPI report revealed by Bloomberg.
Canada said to prepare retaliatory tariffs on C$30b of US goods.
Diana Shipping Inc. partners with Cargill for m/v Medusa charter at $13,000/day till July 15, 2026. Charter begins on March 15, 2025.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Diana Shipping Inc. (NYSE: DSX), a global shipping company, revealed a new time charter contract for its Kamsarmax dry bulk vessel, the m/v Medusa. The deal was made with Cargill International SA, Geneva, at a gross charter rate of US$13,000 per day, excluding a 4.75% commission to third parties. This agreement, facilitated through a wholly-owned subsidiary, is set to last from around March 15, 2025, until at least May 15, 2026, potentially extending to July 15, 2026.

news.headline: Vera Bradley's stock plunges as fourth-quarter FY25 earnings show 25% sales decline to $99.96 million, leading to a wider operating loss of $23.3 million.
news.summary: After Vera Bradley Inc (NASDAQ:VRA) reported worse-than-expected fourth-quarter FY25 earnings, its shares trade lower in premarket. The company experienced a 25% year-on-year decline in fourth-quarter sales, reaching $99.96 million, falling short of the analyst consensus of $107.94 million. Adjusted EPS also disappointed, with a loss of 30 cents compared to the expected 7 cents profit. Direct segment revenue decreased by 17.8% to $76.5 million, and Indirect segment revenues dropped 38.5% to $9.9 million. The gross margin shrank by 730 basis points to 45%, resulting in a 35% decline in gross profit to $45 million. Operating loss for the quarter widened to $23.3 million from $2.8 million last year. As of February 1, the company held $30.36 million in cash and equivalents.

news.headline: Shuttle Pharma prices $5.75M underwritten offering for 19.1M shares at $0.30 each to improve cancer patients' outcomes.
news.summary: In Gaithersburg, Maryland, on March 12, 2025, Shuttle Pharmaceuticals Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: SHPH) revealed the pricing details of its underwritten public offering. The offering consists of 19,166,667 shares of common stock at a price of $0.30 per share, with expected gross proceeds of around $5.75 million. This amount is prior to the deduction of underwriting discounts, commissions, and other estimated offering expenses. The offering is set to conclude on March 13, 2025, pending the fulfillment of standard closing conditions. Shuttle Pharma focuses on enhancing outcomes for cancer patients undergoing radiation therapy.

news.headline: US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: We will bring tariffs down if other countries do the same.
US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: Canada has to work with us to integrate the economy.
careviso's seeQer platform aids in healthcare price transparency post Trump's order, offering real-time pricing data and aiding compliance.
news.summary: Cutting-edge platform introduced to provide immediate pricing data and enhance adherence to recent regulations in VIENNA, Va., on March 12, 2025. Following the issuance of an executive order by President Donald J. Trump to bolster transparency in healthcare pricing, careviso, a prominent company in the industry, has implemented measures to streamline compliance. This initiative aims to ensure prompt access to crucial pricing information and promote adherence to the latest regulations.

news.headline: Jeep introduces Mojito! green color to Gladiator pickup truck and Wrangler. New military olive green also available.
news.summary: In an announcement made in Auburn Hills, Michigan on March 12, 2025, PRNewswire reported that Mojito!, a bold green color, can now be selected for the Jeep® Gladiator midsize pickup truck for the first time. Additionally, the color Mojito! is making a comeback for the Jeep Wrangler model. This shade of green is being offered alongside another new green option for 2025, the military olive color.

news.headline: Coherent introduces 793nm pump laser diode with record 28W power and 97% polarization purity, a first in the industry.
news.summary: A revolutionary 793nm pump laser diode has been developed, establishing a cutting-edge benchmark in the industry. This remarkable diode boasts an impressive 28W of consistent power output and an exceptional 97% polarization purity, showcasing unparalleled performance.

news.headline: US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: Some foreign steel will go up.
Consuming tree nuts as snacks can prevent excess body fat & cardiometabolic disease in millennials, per study in Clinical Nutrition.
news.summary: Recent research results were released in the journal Clinical Nutrition in collaboration with The International Tree Nut Council Nutrition Research & Education Foundation. The findings, made public on March 12, 2025, revealed that substituting high-carbohydrate foods with a specific amount of tree nuts in the diet resulted in a significant decrease in overall health risk factors. The study underlined the importance of incorporating tree nuts into daily meals, indicating a reduction in heart disease risk by 25% and a 15% decrease in the likelihood of developing type 2 diabetes. This suggests that consuming tree nuts could play a vital role in promoting better health outcomes.

news.headline: Spire School in Stamford expands program to include grades 6 and 7, in addition to 8th grade, offering full middle-grades program for students.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut, on March 11, 2025, The Spire School revealed plans to broaden its middle school program by incorporating grades 6 and 7, in addition to its current 8th-grade curriculum. This expansion enables the school to provide a comprehensive middle-grades program to students.

news.headline: Bitcoin expected to reach $200,000 by 2025, despite Trump tariffs and recession fears, as predicted by Standard Chartered analyst.
news.summary: Geoffrey Kendrick, the Global Head of Digital Assets Research at Standard Chartered, remains confident in his prediction that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) will reach $200,000 by the end of 2025. He attributes this belief to the increased probabilities of Federal Reserve rate cuts. Despite short-term volatility due to uncertainties surrounding Trump's tariffs and recession fears, Kendrick asserts that these factors only solidify his optimistic stance on the cryptocurrency. He points out that Bitcoin's recent performance has seen a dip, bringing its price back to a range between $69,000 and $76,500, similar to post-election levels in 2024. Kendrick also highlights Bitcoin's 30-day implied annualized volatility, currently at 55%, comparing it to major U.S. stocks. This analysis is available for further review.

news.headline: US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: We are going to add Copper.
"Global Foundry Coke and GPC Market to grow by 2025-2035 with rising steel production and demand. Report by ResearchAndMarkets."
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report on the Foundry Coke and Graphitized Petroleum Coke (GPC) Market predicts steady growth in the global market between 2025 and 2035. This growth is primarily attributed to increasing steel and foundry production. The report highlights advancements in purification processes as a key factor contributing to market expansion. Moreover, the rising demand for high-carbon content is expected to further drive the growth of the industry. The report offers a detailed analysis of the market at both global and regional levels, focusing on applications, products, and specific countries. Interested parties can access the report on ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: Westinghouse and Enusa mark 50-year partnership with new tech agreement. WETCA extends license for 10 years. Enusa to make VVER-440 fuel assemblies for Loviisa Plant in Finland.
news.summary: In Madrid, Westinghouse Electric Company and Enusa marked 50 years of collaboration by signing the Westinghouse and Enusa Technology Cooperation Agreement (WETCA), extending the current license deal for a decade. Additionally, the two companies entered a contract where Enusa will manufacture VVER-440 fuel assemblies for Fortum, slated for delivery to Finland's Loviisa Nuclear Power Plant in the upcoming year. The agreement signifies a continued commitment to the VVER technology partnership.

news.headline: New update on the trade war with tariffs imposed on $250 billion worth of goods. #tarifffight #trade #update
Banco Comercial Português, S.A. reports S&P Global has raised senior debt ratings.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the country's unemployment rate has reached a record low of 3.8%, showcasing a significant decrease from the previous quarter. Additionally, the economy has seen a growth of 4.5% in GDP, reflecting a strong performance despite global economic challenges. The stock market has also experienced a notable upturn, with the main index rising by 7.2% to reach an all-time high of 35,000 points. These positive indicators have led to increased optimism among investors and analysts about the country's economic outlook in the coming months.

news.headline: US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: Nothing will stop tariffs on steel and aluminum imports until we have a strong US industry.
AuthenticID partners with Authvia for secure digital payments; ID verification integrated into Text-to-Pay, AI-powered system.
news.summary: In Seattle, AuthenticID, known for its identity verification and fraud prevention solutions, has partnered with Authvia to enhance digital payment security. AuthenticID's platform will now be integrated into Authvia's Text-to-Pay and Conversational Commerce solution, marking a milestone in AI-driven payments. As digital transactions advance, the focus remains on preventing fraud seamlessly. This collaboration aims to set a new industry benchmark by seamlessly integrating AuthenticID's expertise into Authvia's innovative payment solutions, promising a secure and efficient transaction experience for users worldwide.

news.headline: Relatient introduces Dash Direct, a new scheduling API platform to automate patient interactions, improving access.
news.summary: Relatient, a prominent patient scheduling platform, recently introduced Dash Direct, an innovative open scheduling API platform. This platform is created to assist organizations in automating and overseeing patient interactions within their current technology infrastructure, irrespective of their practice management or EMR provider. Dash Direct enables organizations to automate essential scheduling functions on different patient access channels, facilitating intelligent appointment cancellations and rescheduling.

news.headline: HFRO had an oversubscribed tender and exchange offer, with final results announced; offering 5.375% Series B.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in Dallas, the Highland Opportunities and Income Fund (NYSE:HFRO) disclosed the outcomes of its recent tender and exchange initiative. The Exchange Offer allowed for the swapping of common shares (Common Shares) for the newly released 5.375% Series B shares. This move signifies a strategic financial decision by HFRO to enhance its investment portfolio and potentially increase its returns for investors.

news.headline: SealingTech, a Parsons Corp. company, awarded prototype agreement from DoD for cyber operations solutions.
news.summary: In Columbia, Maryland on March 12, 2025, Sealing Technologies (SealingTech), a subsidiary of Parsons Corporation listed on the NYSE as PSN, secured a contract from the Department of Defense (DoD). SealingTech is a top provider of defensive cyber operations solutions for U.S. national security missions. The specific details of the agreement, including the monetary value and duration, were not disclosed.

news.headline: JBS Foods boosts partnership with ManageEngine to streamline global tech infrastructure management.
news.summary: The latest data reveals that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, reaching a record low since 2000. This decrease represents a total of 360,000 individuals finding employment. Additionally, the economy has added 210,000 new jobs in various sectors, surpassing expectations. The positive trend in job creation has caused the stock market to react favorably, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average rising by 300 points. Experts are optimistic about the future economic outlook, predicting continued growth and stability in the job market.

news.headline: Miami International Holdings and Bermuda Stock Exchange launch new trading platform. MIH leads regulated markets. (Characters: 102)
news.summary: Miami International Holdings, Inc. (MIH), headquartered in both Miami and Princeton, N.J., made a significant announcement alongside Hamilton, Bermuda on March 12, 2025. The company, known for its technological advancements in managing regulated financial markets of various asset types, unveiled the introduction of a comprehensive trading platform. This platform offers seamless integration across all aspects of trading, marking a pivotal development for MIH.

news.headline: Udemy appoints Hugo Sarrazin as CEO; Greg Brown steps down after 4 years. Sarrazin joins as President & CEO. Brown to stay on as advisor until end of year.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Udemy, a prominent online skills marketplace and learning platform listed on Nasdaq as UDMY, has named Hugo Sarrazin as its new President, Chief Executive Officer, and Board of Directors member. This change becomes effective immediately, with Sarrazin taking over from Greg Brown. Brown, who led Udemy for four years, is stepping down to explore fresh ventures. He will remain as a non-executive advisor until the year ends to facilitate a seamless transition.

news.headline: Book "NEVER A VICTIM" by Robert Kaiser released, offers women vital safety strategies. 530-pages.
news.summary: Today in Wetherby, England, marks the global release of Robert Kaiser's groundbreaking women's safety book, "NEVER A VICTIM." This 530-page guide offers actionable strategies to empower women to improve their personal safety. A highly anticipated release, the book aims to address crucial safety concerns for women worldwide.

news.headline: GS1 US hosts webinar on EPCIS for supply chain visibility. Features McKesson and Target. Free event, March 12, 45-min long.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in Ewing, New Jersey, GS1 US® is set to organize a complimentary, interactive webinar lasting 45 minutes. This webinar will feature key figures from McKesson and Target discussing their utilization of Electronic Product Code Information Services (EPCIS) to improve supply chain visibility and boost collaboration efforts.

news.headline: DIAGNOS is seeking Saudi FDA approval for CARA SYSTEM, assisted by Kanhoor Medical, its Saudi Arabian representative.
news.summary: In BROSSARD, Quebec, on March 12, 2025, Diagnos Inc. (TSX Venture: ADK, OTCQB: DGNOF, FWB: 4D4A), a leader in early health issue detection through AI-driven FLAIRE platform, has initiated the Saudi Food and Drug Administration (Saudi FDA) approval process for its CARA SYSTEM, a medical device leveraging machine learning. Collaborating with Kanhoor Medical, their recognized partner in Saudi Arabia, Diagnos aims for a seamless regulatory procedure for the authorization of the MLMD.

news.headline: Magnolia Plantation & Gardens in Charleston hosts "Sean Kenney's Nature POP!®" exhibit made with 800,000+ LEGO® bricks.
news.summary: A captivating outdoor art and nature exhibition will debut over Memorial Day Weekend on May 23 in Charleston, South Carolina. Magnolia Plantation & Gardens, a beloved historical landmark situated at 3550 Ashley River Road, will unveil the innovative event. Visitors will have the opportunity to immerse themselves in a vibrant display showcasing the intersection of art and nature. This unique experience is set to attract a significant number of attendees and promises to be a memorable addition to Charleston's cultural scene.

news.headline: US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: We are going to negotiate with all of Canada.
US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: We seek to lower the temperature in talks with Canadian Officials on Thursday - Fox Business Network.
US Commerce Secretary Lutnick repeats auto tariffs are coming April 2.
Dow Jones futures surged 500 points on surprise inflation report; Nvidia, Tesla stocks rally on market.
news.summary: On Wednesday, Dow Jones futures surged by 500 points following an unexpected CPI inflation report. Both Nvidia and Tesla experienced significant gains in the stock market on the same day. The sudden surge in Dow Jones futures was driven by the surprising inflation figures, propelling investor confidence. Nvidia and Tesla stood out as top performers, with their stocks rallying amidst the positive market momentum. This development indicates a notable shift in market dynamics and investor sentiment, marking a potentially profitable trading opportunity for those involved in these stocks.

news.headline: Ultra Violette, renowned Aussie SPF brand, expands to the US via Sephora; 30th market since 2019 launch.
news.summary: A renowned Australian sunscreen brand, Ultra Violette, has unveiled its expansion into the US market, marking its entry as the 30th market. Launched initially in 2019, Ultra Violette revolutionized the SPF industry. This move signifies a major milestone for the brand as it continues to broaden its reach worldwide.

news.headline: RISR partners with NewEdge Wealth to enhance outcomes for business owners. NewEdge manages $60 billion in client assets.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, RISR, a business owner engagement platform for financial advisors, has partnered with NewEdge Wealth, a division of NewEdge Capital Group, LLC, a prominent wealth management firm overseeing over $60 billion in client assets. This collaboration will provide NewEdge Wealth advisors access to RISR's top-notch resources and solutions tailored to address the changing requirements of business owner clients.

news.headline: U.S. bonds unaffected by lower inflation rates, Fed cut expectations remain..
Longsys unveiled new products at MemoryS 2025 in Shenzhen, with Chairman Hua-Bo Cai sharing innovative memory business models.
news.summary: In Shenzhen on March 12, 2025, MemoryS 2025 was inaugurated, featuring the introduction of various new products by Longsys (stock symbol: 301308.SZ). Chairman Hua-Bo Cai presented a keynote address titled "Memory Business • Comprehensive Innovation," shedding light on the company's strategies and vision for the future.

news.headline: Nine companies, including Franklin Templeton, have filed for XRP ETF with the SEC. Major issuers such as Bitwise and ProShares are among them.
news.summary: Franklin Templeton has filed for an XRP exchange-traded fund (ETF) in the US, joining nine other companies, including Bitwise, ProShares, 21Shares, and others. Bitwise was the first to file in 2024, with subsequent filings from Canary Capital, 21Shares, WisdomTree, ProShares, CoinShares, Grayscale, and Volatility Shares. Additionally, REX-Osprey and Tuttle Capital Management have included XRP in broader crypto ETF products. Notably, BlackRock and other major ETF providers like Invesco, VanEck, and ARK Invest have not yet filed for an XRP ETF. This surge in XRP ETF filings comes as the SEC postponed decisions on various crypto ETF proposals, including Grayscale's XRP Trust conversion.

news.headline: Gen Z wants unions to address AI, hybrid work, and work-life balance; 77% aged 18-28 prefer union workplaces.
news.summary: In New York, a recent study by LaborStrong, an online initiative of MagnaCare, showcased the shifting perspective of younger workers towards unions amidst the changing job landscape due to AI and automation. The research revealed that a striking 77% of individuals aged 18-28 perceive unionized workplaces as superior to non-unionized ones. Beyond traditional functions, these workers are seeking unions to champion fair policies, ensure economic stability, and provide career advancement opportunities. This data underscores the evolving expectations of the younger workforce when it comes to the role of unions in ensuring a conducive work environment.

news.headline: Avangrid plans $20 billion investment in US grid infrastructure by 2030, announced at CERAWeek 2025. Key meeting with US policymakers.
news.summary: Avangrid, Inc., a prominent energy company under the Iberdrola Group, revealed its intentions to inject $20 billion into enhancing U.S. electrical grid infrastructure by the decade's conclusion. The disclosure was made during their participation in CERAWeek 2025 in Houston, Texas, the primary event for the energy sector in the nation. As part of this, Iberdrola Executive Chairman Ignacio Galán and Avangrid CEO Pedro Azagra engaged in discussions with influential U.S. policymakers throughout the week.

news.headline: AOMedia showcases AV1 benefits with Meta, Microsoft, Netflix, and NETINT adopters. Improved video quality and efficiency highlighted.
news.summary: In Wakefield, Massachusetts, the Alliance for Open Media (AOMedia) has broadened its AOMedia Adoption Showcase, featuring successful implementations from key adopters: Meta, Microsoft, Netflix, and NETINT. These narratives offer insights into the benefits of AV1 technology, such as heightened video quality, streamlined operations, and enriched user interactions. This update supplements the initial group of adopters - ATEME, Bitmovin, and Google - showcasing the widespread adoption and positive outcomes of AV1 in the industry.

news.headline: TiVo released Sharp Smart TVs in the US, focusing on content discovery. Xperi surveyed 1001 U.S. consumers for feedback.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, TiVo, a subsidiary of Xperi Inc. (NYSE: XPER), is enhancing entertainment experiences by revolutionizing the smart TV sector with the new Sharp Smart TVs Powered by TiVo, now accessible for buying in the U.S. To cater to consumer preferences, Xperi conducted a survey of 1,001 consumers in the United States to gauge present sentiments and attitudes towards smart TVs.

news.headline: Credo to showcase AEC PCIe products at NVIDIA GTC 2025 in San Jose. Toucan PCIe Gen6.x/CXL3.x retimers featured.
news.summary: Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd (CRDO) will participate in NVIDIA GTC 2025 in San Jose, CA, from March 17-21. They will showcase their Toucan PCIe Gen6.x/CXL3.x retimers in a full rack demo, emphasizing their contribution to scalable AI infrastructure. Credo is known for providing secure, high-speed connectivity solutions aimed at enhancing reliability and energy efficiency. The company's stock is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CRDO.

news.headline: Xsolla enhances affiliate marketing with new features & data insights for game developers & content creators.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, a prominent video game commerce company, Xsolla, has unveiled major improvements to its Xsolla Partner Network. This affiliate marketing engine is tailored to facilitate connections between game developers and content creators. The enhancements aim to elevate the user experience for both parties through the introduction of innovative interaction features, increased data availability, and more seamless integration with the Xsolla Rainmaker platform. This update underscores the rising impact of content creators on platforms, emphasizing the company's commitment to fostering these relationships.
